selections.name: In Circles
selections.reason: Outstanding effort when resuming at Hawkesbury, missing by a neck. Second-up now, stays at provincial level, and draws perfectly. The one to beat.

selections.name: Knowing Look
selections.reason: Resuming for Waterhouse/Bott. Debuted in Metro company at Warwick Farm last prep. Trials have been solid. Big watch first-up.

selections.name: Odin's Eye
selections.reason: First starter for Team Hawkes. Trials have been encouraging (placed 2nd and 3rd). Respect the stable with debutants.

selections.name: Ouragan
selections.reason: Debuted at Rosehill (Metro) and wasn't disgraced. Drops significantly in class here. Can improve.

danger_horse.name: Knowing Look
danger_horse.reason: Elite stable and Metro experience make her a major threat to the favorite.

selections.name: Anthropoid
selections.reason: Massive class edge. Ran 4th in the G3 Golden Gift and 4th at Randwick Open class. This is a standard Provincial Handicap. Should be winning.

selections.name: Raise The Bar
selections.reason: Maher stable debutant who won a trial at Warwick Farm. Looks primed for a bold showing.

selections.name: Machrihanish
selections.reason: Has contested Group 3 company (Widden Stakes). Experience counts here despite the wide margin last time.

selections.name: Gold Globe
selections.reason: Fair effort at Canterbury last start. Experience in Metro maidens helps.

selections.name: Mister Martini
selections.reason: Excellent 3rd at Canterbury (Metro) last start. Drops to Provincial level and draws the rail. The form line is superior.

selections.name: The Big Blue
selections.reason: Resuming. Showed good ability last prep with multiple placings. O'Shea/Lloyd combo commands respect.

selections.name: Feazabeel
selections.reason: Placed at Warwick Farm two starts back. 5th at Goulburn was okay. Fit and capable.

selections.name: Peace At Last
selections.reason: Consistent 4th at this track last time. Cummings stable. Each-way claims.

danger_horse.name: The Big Blue
danger_horse.reason: Fresh horse with proven ability to place. Could sprint well fresh.

selections.name: All Star
selections.reason: Ran 3rd in a BM64 at this track last start. Now drops back to a Maiden Plate. Huge class advantage.

selections.name: Barrengarry
selections.reason: Improving type, placed 3rd at Kembla last start. Draws the inside and should be in the finish.

selections.name: She's A Dame
selections.reason: Consistent filly, placed at Kembla and Gosford recently. Will be thereabouts.

selections.name: Almonzo
selections.reason: Kris Lees runner who ran 4th at Scone. Barrier is tricky but has ability.

danger_horse.name: Barrengarry
danger_horse.reason: Progressive and drawn to get the perfect run.

selections.name: Mediaro
selections.reason: Ran 4th in a BM72 at Warwick Farm last start. Drops significantly in grade to a Provincial BM64. Rates highest.

selections.name: Lugarno
selections.reason: Solid 4th at Canterbury BM64. Metro form holds up well here. John Thompson stable.

selections.name: Monty Be Quick
selections.reason: Last start winner at Hawkesbury in this grade. In peak form and draws well.

selections.name: Golden Smile
selections.reason: Consistent mare, runner-up at Hawkesbury last time. Honest and will run well.

danger_horse.name: Lugarno
danger_horse.reason: Metro performance suggests he is ready to win at this level.

selections.name: Titanium Miss
selections.reason: Won a BM72 at Warwick Farm in January. Drops to BM68 here. Top weight is offset by class superiority.

selections.name: Spaceballs
selections.reason: Last start winner at Hawkesbury. Drawn perfectly in barrier 2 to get a soft run.

selections.name: Allapercanto
selections.reason: Resumed with a solid 3rd at Kembla. Will strip fitter and draws the rail.

selections.name: Totoka
selections.reason: Ran 2nd at this track/grade last start. Wide draw is a concern but has the ability.

danger_horse.name: Spaceballs
danger_horse.reason: Winning form and an ideal map make her dangerous.

selections.name: Coal Crusher
selections.reason: Group 2 winner and G1 placed. Drops from G2/G3 company. Massive class runner of the field. Should dominate.

selections.name: Just Feelin' Lucky
selections.reason: Group 3 winner. Resumed well in the Triscay. Second-up record is excellent. The main danger.

selections.name: Tuileries
selections.reason: Ran 5th in the G3 Triscay. Snowden polish. Good value for exotics.

selections.name: Getafix
selections.reason: Solid 3rd in BM88 at Randwick. Fit and racing well.

danger_horse.name: Just Feelin' Lucky
danger_horse.reason: Proven Group performer who excels second-up.

selections.name: Yabby Pump
selections.reason: Ran 6th in a Rosehill Midway (BM72). Drops to Provincial BM64. This is a significant class drop. Ready to win.

selections.name: Fiftyfivechevy
selections.reason: Another dropping from Metro grade. 6th at Warwick Farm. Capable at this level.

selections.name: Waerea
selections.reason: Progressive 3yo coming off a win at Kembla. On an upward spiral.

selections.name: Coyote
selections.reason: Consistent type with a placing at this track last start. Drawn well.

danger_horse.name: Fiftyfivechevy
danger_horse.reason: Class dropper who can surprise if the pace is on.
